hidden_state.wab_instruction: Handle an incident: read the alert thread to find the error code and on-call engineer. Forward the alert to the on-call engineer with the error code. Reply to the manager's status request with the incident summary.

task_completion_criteria.status_phrase: I am actively triaging the incident.
